day_trace.speech: Hello! Did someone do some mischief somewhere else last night? SafetySam's gossip proves that I am a minion? You are just a werewolf who is trying to change the direction of things, and you want me to be your scapegoat! The whole group of people have been pretending to be mysterious since they woke up early in the morning, and the real fire has been buried! Today we have the same goal. If the other person acts mysterious and leads the way, I will be the first to die! Tell me your true identity quickly, before you make me angry!
